start_connection_screen.initiate_text: If you want to initiate a connection
start_connection_screen.connect_text: If you want to connect to already created peer

copy_code_screen.your_code_text: This is your two-word pair cod. Copy and send it to your friend
copy_code_screen.wait_text: Wait your friend to paste the code for button enabling

paste_code_screen.paste_code_text: Copy your friend’s code and paste it to the text input below:

connection_screen.warn_termination_text: This leads to the termination of your connection
connection_screen.return_to_prev_step_text: Return to the previous step and try to pair once again
connection_screen.device_to_accept_text: Waiting your friend’s device to accept...
connection_screen.device_to_answer_text: Waiting your friend’s device to answer...
